engagement.justification: Directly addresses how to decide when the right thing to do is unclear, weighing consequence-based and rule-based considerations.

coherence.justification: It moves through several views but the chain is muddled in places ('there would be nothing to share with anyone who gets hurt') and the conclusion is an overstuffed list.

substance.justification: It contrasts maximizing helped numbers against inviolable rules and offers a case, doing real work in surfacing the tension.
